params.value: SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, StageName, CloseDate, Account.Name FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = false AND RecordType.Name != 'Customer Self Service' AND CloseDate < TODAY AND OwnerId IN ({{JS_Config.repIdInClause()}}) ORDER BY CloseDate ASC LIMIT 500
